title: Extract PTS archive
body:
There's an archive of Pāli Text Society texts contained in this ISO: [PTS CD-ROM 2.5](https://buddhasasana.net/cloud/Miscellany/PaliText-V2.5-Dhammakaya-Foundation.iso)

It's some software which runs on a pre-millenium version of Windows. Rumour has it, it's a FoxPro db format—although that may be a red herring.

The mission is to crack open the ancient digital format and extract the rare gems. 

PTS were—until very recently—notoriously anti-technology, so this is the only digital format of those texts which exists. They normally only ever released [printed editions](https://palitextsociety.org/product-category/canonical-texts/) of these texts, some of them going back to the 1800's.
